hook: Trust becomes easier when the pace matches the depth of the connection.
body: Moving too fast can create false closeness that your actual knowledge of each other cannot support.

hook: Early intensity sometimes feels romantic when it is really a shortcut around uncertainty.
body: Healthy pacing protects trust by letting reality catch up with emotion.

hook: Healthy pacing protects trust by letting reality catch up with emotion.
body: Frequent contact can be good, but declarations and expectations usually work better after actual consistency exists.

hook: Frequent contact can be good, but declarations and expectations usually work better after actual consistency exists.
body: Let the seriousness of your behavior match how much real data you have about the person.
